dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Unlike the baseline which suffered a JSON Parse Failure in the rules-context-loader, this trace shows 100% success in the initial governance injection phase. The model successfully validated the schema for the rules context, ensuring that architectural constraints were present for all downstream tasks.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map handled a substantial context load of 48,651 prompt tokens without degradation. The transition from mapping to intent generation remained logically consistent, as evidenced by the successful schema validations at each hand-off point.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine reached full completion with verified schema output. This is a critical recovery from previous baseline issues where this stage was compromised. The successful generation of the alignment report indicates that trade-offs were identified and mapped to the architectural evolution steps.
